schema_version.description: Version of the DITTO schema set this document conforms to

produced_at.description: RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 datetime with timezone offset

id.description: Story id: us- prefix + kebab-case (machine identity other schemas reference)

owner.description: Product owner of the story — freshness/judgment subject

want.description: "I want <want>" — the capability the actor seeks

value.description: "so that <value>" — the value the capability delivers

items.description: Journey id: jrn- prefix + kebab-case (machine identity of the journey)

journey_ids.description: Journeys (jrn- ids) that realize this story — story→journey is 1:N

acg-story-spec.description: ACG StorySpec — first-class user-story catalog entry (owns journeys 1:N)
